title: The Expedition of Humphry Clinker
author: Smollett, T. (Tobias)
summary: Presented as a set of letters, the excerpt introduces Jonathan Dustwich, a would-be editor who offers recently recovered correspondence to a London bookseller, and a range of provincial characters assembled at Brambleton Hall. Mr. Bramble, a gouty, irascible country squire, prepares to travel to the Hot Well at Bristol; his sister Tabitha, housekeeper Mrs. Gwyllim, servants (Williams, Barns, Saul, John Thomas), and neighbours (Griffy/Griffin, Ponto the dog) populate domestic incidents. The letters mix legal anxieties about publication, comic dialect, Latin learnedisms, and preparations for travel and household removal.
